channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyan Couple Reunites After Months Apart as Husband Joins Newborn Baby's Life
item.description: A Kenyan woman shared an emotional story of her husband's journey from Dubai to Kenya to meet their newborn child, fulfilling a promise made during a difficult period. After quitting her job in Dubai ...

item.title: PNP Clarifies National Crime Trends, Emphasizes Regional Data Over Metro Manila Focus
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) emphasized that the country's overall crime situation cannot be assessed solely based on incidents in Metro Manila, despite recent high-profile crimes sparking pub...

item.title: Criticism of Progressive Conservatives Over Public Fund Mismanagement
item.description: The article compiles letters to the editor criticizing the Progressive Conservative government of Ontario for misusing public funds, lack of transparency, and political egos. One letter highlights Dou...

item.title: Atiku calls for investigation into N210bn budget duplication in 2026
item.description: Atiku Abubakar, former VP and ADC presidential candidate, has demanded a forensic investigation into Nigeria's 2026 budget after BusinessDay's report revealed N210.23bn in duplicated allocations acros...

item.title: Argentina and Spain Set for 2026 World Cup Final on July 19th
item.description: The 23rd FIFA World Cup will culminate in a historic final between defending champions Argentina and European champions Spain on Sunday, 19 July 2026. The match, held at the New York-New Jersey Stadiu...

item.title: Kerala Chief Minister Supports Delhi Protests Against Authoritarian Rule
item.description: Kerala Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has publicly supported the ongoing protests at Jantar Mantar in New Delhi, where student and youth activists are demanding democratic rights. In a Facebook post,...

item.title: Christians Called to Live by God's Word
item.description: The article emphasizes that as Christians, our identities, perspectives, and decisions should be rooted in God's Word rather than worldly influences. It highlights the importance of viewing all aspect...

item.title: Prenatal Estrogen and Finger Lengths May Link to Human Brain Evolution
item.description: A study published in Early Human Development suggests that prenatal estrogen exposure may have contributed to the evolution of larger human brains. Researchers from Swansea University and Istanbul Uni...

item.title: Risks and Benefits of Diabetes Management Technology
item.description: The article explores the dual-edged nature of diabetes management technology, such as insulin pumps and continuous glucose monitors (CGMs), which have revolutionised care for type 1 diabetes patients ...

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Death and Its Political Fallout
item.description: The article discusses the death of Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) and its implications for U.S. politics, particularly focusing on President Donald Trump's reaction. Trump posted a self-aggrandizing eu...

item.title: Young Woman Critically Injured in Mississauga Hospital Incident
item.description: A young woman has been critically injured after being struck near Mississauga Hospital, according to a report by CTV News. The incident occurred on July 19, 2026, and paramedics were called to the sce...

item.title: South African Reporter's Live Broadcast Interrupted by Robbers
item.description: A South African TV reporter shared a terrifying experience when armed robbers stormed his live broadcast setup, stealing phones and broadcasting equipment. The incident, captured on video, shows the c...

item.title: Conflicting Accounts of Orire School Abduction: Teacher Claims Release, Government Says Rescue

item.title: EU's New Border System Causes Significant Delays at Airports
item.description: The European Union's new digital Entry Exit System (EES) has led to significant delays at passport control points, with reports indicating processing times have nearly tripled for UK travellers. Rome'...

item.title: Expert Discusses Dietary Strategies for Diabetes Management
item.description: The article details a presentation by dietitian Jess de Voogd at the Bairnsdale and District Diabetes Support Group meeting, focusing on managing blood glucose through strategic dietary choices. De Vo...

item.title: Raymond Gutierrez considers BL project and possible acting comeback
item.description: Raymond Gutierrez, the popular Filipino actor and host, has expressed openness to participating in a Boy's Love (BL) project and potentially making a comeback in the entertainment industry. The news c...

item.title: Koeberg nuclear plant confirms minor radioactive incidents were safely contained
item.description: South Africa's sole nuclear power station, Koeberg, experienced four minor radioactive contamination incidents during scheduled maintenance work. Electricity Minister Kgosientsho Ramokgopa and Eskom o...

item.title: Ad Hoc Committee Chair Lekganyane defends draft report findings amid criticism
item.description: The Ad Hoc Committee Chair, Soviet Lekganyane, has dismissed social media reports alleging the committee's draft findings exonerated individuals, calling them premature and gullible. The committee, in...

item.title: Former Gangster Transforms into Successful Landlord Thanks to Support
item.description: Mike Sonko, former Nairobi governor, has celebrated Abdul Noor Mohammed (Jawe), a former gangster who transformed his life into becoming a landlord and property owner. During a ceremony, Sonko handed ...

item.title: Tanzania News Update: July 19, 2026
item.description: The article appears to be a template or placeholder for a news publication, likely from Tanzania Insight. While the content is incomplete, it references various categories such as politics, society, b...
